text:
The following page is an overall gallery of Fullmetal Alchemist the Movie: Conqueror of Shamballa.

Concept art

 
Characters =
 
2005 edward.png|Edward at 18 years old, wearing his Coat over his normal attire.
2005 ed.png|Edward without his coat.
2005 ed arm prosthesis.png|Edward's arm prosthesis in the movie.
2005 ed legs prosthesis.png|Edward's leg prosthesis in the movie.
alphonse-cos.png|Alphonse Eric, with his back in his human form, two years after his older brother goes to our world.
2005 rose.png|Rose's appearance for the film (20 years old).
Roy_2005.png|Roy Mustang at 32 years old, wearing his eyepatch from his battle with King Bradley at the end of the anime.
